verses.text: Amah hoih ahih manin Topa tungah lungdamna ko un; bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip tawntung hi
Lungdamna pen pasian-te' Pasian' tungah ko un; bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip tawntung hi
Lungdamna pen topate' Topa' tungah ko un; bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip tawntung hi
Na lamdang lian a bawl amah bek Pasian ahipa tungah, bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip tawntung hi
Theihna tawh vantungte a bawlpa tungah, bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip tawntung hi
Tuite tungah leitung a zalpa tungah, bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip tawntung hi
Khuavak lianpite a bawlpa tungah, bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip tawntung hi
Sun pen ni a uksakpa tungah, bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip tawntung hi
Zan pen kha leh aksite a uksakpa tungah, bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip tawntung hi
Egypt gam tacil khempeuh a vatmaipa tungah, bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip tawntung hi
Amau' gamsung pan Israel-te a paikhiatpihpa tungah, bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip tawntung hi
A baan zanin a khut thahat tawh a paikhiatpihpa tungah, bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip tawntung hi
San Tuipi a phelkhampa tungah, bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip tawntung hi
Israel-te tui laizang a kantan sakpa tungah, bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip tawntung hi
Ahih hangin Faro leh a mihonte San Tuipi sungah a thalpaihpa tungah, bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip tawntung hi
Sehnel gam nawkin ama mite a paipihpa tungah, bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip tawntung hi
Kumpi liante a vatmaipa tungah, bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip tawntung hi
Kumpi minthangte a thatpa tungah, bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip tawntung hi
Amor mite' kumpipa Sihon' hang leh, bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip tawntung hi
Bashan kumpipa Og' hangin, bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip tawntung hi
Amaute' leitang pen gamhluah dingin a piakhiapa tungah, bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip tawntung hi
Ama nasem Israel tungah gamh-a a piapa tungah, bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip tawntung hi
Miniam ihih laitakin a hong phawkpa tungah, bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip tawntung hi
I galte' kiang pan eite hong honkhiapa tungah, bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip tawntung hi
Nuntakna a nei khempeuh an a vakpa tungah, bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip tawntung hi
Vantung Pasian' tungah lungdamna ko un; bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip tawntung hi.
